languages.text: Хищный силуэт клинка выдает в его создателях ценителей первоклассного оружия и изысканных страданий, которые оно способно причинить.

traits.locale_text: Хищный силуэт клинка выдает в его создателях ценителей первоклассного оружия и изысканных страданий, которые оно способно причинить.

languages.text: The predatory silhouette of this blade reveals its creators to be connoisseurs of first-class weapons and the exquisite suffering they can inflict.
languages.original_text: Хищный силуэт клинка выдает в его создателях ценителей первоклассного оружия и изысканных страданий, которые оно способно причинить.

traits.locale_text: The predatory silhouette of this blade reveals its creators to be connoisseurs of first-class weapons and the exquisite suffering they can inflict.
The predatory silhouette of this blade reveals its creators to be connoisseurs of first-class weapons and the exquisite suffering they can inflict.
The predatory silhouette of this blade reveals its creators to be connoisseurs of first-class weapons and the exquisite suffering they can inflict.

languages.text: La silueta depredadora de esta espada revela que sus creadores eran expertos en armas de gran calidad y en el tormento que se puede infligir con ellas.
languages.original_text: The predatory silhouette of this blade reveals its creators to be connoisseurs of first-class weapons and the exquisite suffering they can inflict.

traits.locale_text: La silueta depredadora de esta espada revela que sus creadores eran expertos en armas de gran calidad y en el tormento que se puede infligir con ellas.

languages.text: 这把刀刃掠食者般的轮廓，暴露出其创造者不仅是顶级武器的行家里手，也深谙武器所能造成的极致痛苦。
languages.original_text: The predatory silhouette of this blade reveals its creators to be connoisseurs of first-class weapons and the exquisite suffering they can inflict.

traits.locale_text: 这把刀刃掠食者般的轮廓，暴露出其创造者不仅是顶级武器的行家里手，也深谙武器所能造成的极致痛苦。

languages.text: La silhouette prédatrice de cette lame trahit le savoir-faire de ses créateurs dans le domaine des armes de premier ordre et des raffinements de souffrance qu'elles peuvent infliger.
languages.original_text: The predatory silhouette of this blade reveals its creators to be connoisseurs of first-class weapons and the exquisite suffering they can inflict.

traits.locale_text: La silhouette prédatrice de cette lame trahit le savoir-faire de ses créateurs dans le domaine des armes de premier ordre et des raffinements de souffrance qu'elles peuvent infliger.

languages.text: Bu kılıcın yırtıcı silüeti, yaratıcılarının birinci sınıf silahların ve bunların verebileceği zarif acıların uzmanı olduğunu ortaya koyuyor.
languages.original_text: The predatory silhouette of this blade reveals its creators to be connoisseurs of first-class weapons and the exquisite suffering they can inflict.

traits.locale_text: Bu kılıcın yırtıcı silüeti, yaratıcılarının birinci sınıf silahların ve bunların verebileceği zarif acıların uzmanı olduğunu ortaya koyuyor.

languages.text: この刃の鋭いシルエットは、その作匠が最高級の武器と、その武器がもたらす極上の苦痛を熟知していることを物語る。
languages.original_text: The predatory silhouette of this blade reveals its creators to be connoisseurs of first-class weapons and the exquisite suffering they can inflict.

traits.locale_text: この刃の鋭いシルエットは、その作匠が最高級の武器と、その武器がもたらす極上の苦痛を熟知していることを物語る。

languages.text: Die raubtierhafte Silhouette dieser Klinge offenbart die Vorliebe ihrer Schöpfer für erstklassige Waffen und das erlesene Leid, das sie verursachen.
languages.original_text: The predatory silhouette of this blade reveals its creators to be connoisseurs of first-class weapons and the exquisite suffering they can inflict.

traits.locale_text: Die raubtierhafte Silhouette dieser Klinge offenbart die Vorliebe ihrer Schöpfer für erstklassige Waffen und das erlesene Leid, das sie verursachen.
